problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Spintronics for low-power data storage is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
